pages.text: $(l)Mana Rebirth$() grants a resurrection effect similar to a Totem of Undying, powered by Botania mana.$(br2)$(l)Max Level:$() 5$(br)$(l)Type:$() Healing/Utility$(br)$(l)Botania Mana Cost:$() 50,000 + 25,000/level$(br2)When active, prevents death by consuming Botania mana (configurable cost, default 100,000). Heals you to 30% HP (configurable) with a dramatic visual effect. The buff lasts until triggered or it expires.
